'''''Gilder''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]]. It was used once to transfer Rebel officials to [[Dunari's Rest]] presumably for some shipping negotiations.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
